description: Send notifications to your own DAPNET destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise dapnet:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a DAPNET calls API JSON body and post it to hampager.de (no Apprise).
name: msg-to-dapnet

request.template: {"urls":"dapnet://${ customer_secrets.DAPNET_USER }:${ customer_secrets.DAPNET_PASSWORD }@${ customer_secrets.DAPNET_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"dapnet://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"callSignNames":["${ customer_secrets.DAPNET_CALLSIGN }"],"transmitterGroupNames":["${ customer_secrets.DAPNET_TRANSMITTER_GROUP }"],"emergency":false}

{"text":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"callSignNames":["${ customer_secrets.DAPNET_CALLSIGN }"],"transmitterGroupNames":["${ customer_secrets.DAPNET_TRANSMITTER_GROUP }"],"emergency":false}
